response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified pixel-art intro/outro and a main vocal performance scene. 2. Performed a web search for 'XY&Z 佐智久 歌詞' and 'XY&Z Sachiku lyrics' as seen on-screen at 01:10. 3. Confirmed song title as 'XY&Z' composed by Sachiku (Tomohisa Sako). 4. Retrieved official lyrics in Japanese and English. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on visual transitions. 6. Populated JSON with identified metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber, Haku Koyori, performing a live cover of the song 'XY&Z', which was originally written by Tomohisa Sako and made famous by Rica Matsumoto as the opening theme for Pokémon XY&Z. The video includes an introductory game-like sequence, the live performance, and a post-performance talk.

scenes.description: The video begins with a pixel-art style, game-like intro sequence featuring the VTuber, Haku Koyori, interacting with other characters. No vocal music is present.

Haku Koyori performs a live cover of the song 'XY&Z' on a virtual concert stage with pixel-themed animations. On-screen text displays the song title 'XY&Z' and credits the composition to Sachiku (Tomohisa Sako).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
へい!カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
(ニトロチャージ熱く行こうぜ)
さあ!進もうぜ いつでも準備はOK
(かたやぶりへんげんじざいで)
重なり合う想いがシンクロして
決して消えない絆になるから
どこまでも強くなれる
俺たちならwoh woh woh yeah
いくZ!!激しく燃えるバトル
いくZ!!ピンチはチャンスだぜ
いこうZ!!きしかいせい
絶対に諦めない
俺たちは諦めない

へい!例えどんな壁が道を塞いだって
(いつでも当たって砕けろで)
さあ!この手でしょうりのほしを掴むんだ
(折れないふくつのこころで)
俺たちはいつでもどんな時も
同じ心で繋がってるから
何度でも立ち上がるぜ
お前となら

いくZ!!手強いライバルたち
いくZ!!決めろいちげきひっさつ!
いこうZ!!負けられない
思いがここにあるから
夢がおれにはあるから

いくZ!!勝ちも負ける痛みも
いくZ!!なんでも分け合える
いこうZ!!仲間がいる
俺たちは一人じゃない!

いくZ!!激しく燃えるバトル
いくZ!!ピンチはチャンスだぜ
いこうZ!!きしかいせい
絶対に諦めない
いくZ!!譲れない夢がある
いくZ!!必ずゲットだぜ
いこうZ!!手を伸ばして
いつか描いた未来へ
誰も知らない高みへ
さあ!上げてくぜ(100万ボルト)
そう!立ち向かって共に行こうぜ
見たことのない夢の向こうまで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey! Like the morning sun shining on Kalos,
Let's go with a hot nitro charge!
Come on! Let's move forward, we're always ready!
With our overlapping feelings synchronized,
It becomes a bond that will never fade away.
Because we can become stronger forever,
If it's us, wow wow yeah!
Go!! A fierce and burning battle
Go!! A crisis is an opportunity
Go!! A comeback
We will never give up,
We will never give up!

Hey! No matter what wall is blocking your path,
Always hit it and break it!
Come on! Grab the star of victory with these hands,
With an unyielding heart.
Because we are always connected by the same heart,
I can stand up again and again if I'm with you.

Go!! Formidable rivals
Go!! Decide with one blow, sure kill!
Go!! Because I'm here with the determination that I can't lose,
Because I have a dream.

Go!! Go through the pain of winning and losing
Go!! We can share anything
Go!! We have friends, so we're not alone!

Go!! A fierce and burning battle
Go!! A crisis is an opportunity
Go!! A comeback, never give up
Go!! I have a dream I won't give up
Go!! I'll definitely get it
Go!! Reach out to the future I once imagined,
To heights no one knows.
Come on! Let's raise it (a million volts!)
Yes! Let's stand up and go together,
To the other side of our dreams that we've never seen before.

scenes.description: After the song performance, Haku Koyori addresses the audience, thanking them and concluding the concert segment of the video.
